CustomField.description: Total Non Discretionary Expenses Other Formula
CustomField.formula: Monthly_Child_Support_Payments_Other__c + Monthly_Spousal_Support_Payments_Other__c + Monthly_Child_Care_Other__c + Monthly_Health_Condition_Expenses_Other__c + Monthly_Fines_Imposed_Court_Other__c + Monthly_Expenses_Empl_Cond_Other__c + Monthly_Debts_Stay_Lifted_Other__c + Monthly_Other_Expenses_Other__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total Non Discretionary Expenses Other Formula
CustomField.label: Total Non Discretionary Exp Other Frml
